argument.script: async (globalVars) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 10; const maxPages = 5; const data = globalVars.extractData || []; if (data.length >= limit) return false; globalVars.pageCount = (globalVars.pageCount || 0) + 1; if (globalVars.pageCount > maxPages) return false; window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight); const nextBtn = document.querySelector('.next-next'); if (nextBtn) { nextBtn.click(); } else { return false; } return {pageCount: globalVars.pageCount}; }
(globalVars) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 10; globalVars.extractData = (globalVars.extractData || []).slice(0, limit); return globalVars; }
